metadata.publisher: Official Gazette of the Republic of Rwanda (no Special of 29/06/2024, Year 63); gazettes.africa archive facsimile (rwandalii.org AKN entry point redirects here)
metadata.source_authority: Republic of Rwanda (Parliament; promulgated by the President)
metadata.source_note: Official Gazette no Special of 29/06/2024 (Year 63; 577-page text-embedded trilingual print served by the gazettes.africa archive facsimile, to which the Rwanda Legal Information Institute AKN entry point redirects; host recorded) carrying Law No 066/2024 of 26/06/2024 determining the State Finances for the 2024/2025 Fiscal Year. Grounds Article 2 (expenditure projections): the projected State expenditures for the 2024/2025 fiscal year are valued at FRW 5,690,144,278,196 (the print's own words spell the amount with the original "NINTY"/ "FOURTY" spellings); Article 3 (consolidated State budget); and the Annex II budget-agency detail including the social-protection sector support under which LODA/MINALOC funds the Vision 2020 Umurenge Programme Direct Support transfers. Captured as the statutory higher-authority anchor for the policy-class VUP Direct Support encoding: the law authorizes the expenditure and prescribes no transfer value, which is set administratively by the LODA operational manual (the Zambia Appropriation Act 2024 anchoring pattern). The fiscal year runs 1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025.
metadata.title: Law No 066/2024 of 26/06/2024 determining the State Finances for the 2024/2025 Fiscal Year - Article 2 expenditure projections (FRW 5,690,144,278,196); Article 3 consolidated State budget
